top_signals.title: Economic Costs For US, Iran Too Great for 'All-Out War,' Says CSIS's Will Todman
top_signals.summary: Will Todman, chief of staff of the Geopolitics and Foreign Policy Department and senior fellow of the Middle East Program at CSIS, said that a low level conflict with outbursts from both the US and Iran is more likely than an 'all-out' war because the economic costs to both countries are too great. Todman said that Iran is 'very keen' to keep control over the Strait of Hormuz as an economic and strategic negotiating tool.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Stocks Pare Iran War-Driven Losses After Dip Buyers Emerge
top_signals.summary: US equities nearly erased early losses that were driven by fears of US-Iran war escalation that pushed energy prices higher.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Ukraine to get ‘license’ for making Patriot interceptors, Trump pledges
top_signals.summary: "It’s a defensive weapon, which I like better than an offensive weapon,” Trump said. Russian media quickly picked up on the announcement.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Lara drills Planalto toward $1B Brazil copper test
top_signals.summary: The junior is advancing the Planalto copper-gold project in Brazil with major drilling, strong PEA economics and potential buyer interest.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Gold, critical minerals gain trust premium as money, supply chains fray
top_signals.summary: Gold and critical minerals are key as investors assess debt risks, central bank buying, supply issues, and resource nationalism.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.summary: Fed Minutes Show ‘a Few’ Officials Saw Case for June Hike  Bloomberg
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Dinari, tZERO join forces on turnkey platform for tokenized U.S. equities
Tokenized stock transfers surge 105% in a month to $8.4B
top_signals.summary: Industry data shows trading activity and market value accelerating as crypto companies and traditional financial institutions expand tokenized equity initiatives.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Royalty juniors seek higher value in metals rally
top_signals.summary: Smaller royalty firms like Ecora and Empress see rising metals prices and mine financing demand narrowing valuation gaps with major players.
